get.description:
Model viewset that filters queryset by the caller's current team.

Usage::

    class StudyViewSet(TeamScopedModelViewSet):
        queryset = Study.objects.all()
        serializer_class = StudySerializer

Override ``get_queryset()`` to further filter; the default implementation
already restricts rows to ``team=self.get_team()`` if the model has a
``team`` FK.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A UUID string identifying this concept block.

get.description:
Per-concept aggregate report for this block.

MVP heuristic:
- ``sessions_seen`` = # completed sessions whose
  :attr:`InterviewSession.moderator_state.concepts_shown`
  contains the concept id.
- ``dimensions`` = 4-dim score vector (sentiment /
  purchase_intent / appeal / comprehension) computed by
  :mod:`merism.concept.dimensions` over the concatenated
  participant turns for that concept across all sessions.
- ``winner_concept_id`` = highest ``purchase_intent``, ties
  broken by ``appeal`` then ``sentiment``. Falls back to
  ``sessions_seen`` when no dimension scores exist.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A UUID string identifying this concept block.

get.description:
Export the session transcript.

``?as=clean``   (default) — intelligent-verbatim text
``?as=raw``              — original ASR text
``?as=srt``              — timed subtitles (auto-generated
                           from transcript timestamps)

Tenant-scoped via the base queryset; no extra auth layer needed.
Note: the query param is ``as`` (not ``format``) to avoid DRF's
content-negotiation machinery hijacking the suffix.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A UUID string identifying this interview session.

get.description: SSE stream of session events — mounts onto merism.realtime.sse_interview.

get.description: ``GET /api/users/me/`` — current user + their first active team.

CategoryEnum.description:
* `pricing` - Pricing
* `onboarding` - Onboarding
* `churn` - Churn
* `concept_test` - Concept Test
* `usability` - Usability
* `other` - Other

ChannelConfig.description: Credentials are write-only (plaintext in) and masked on read.

ChannelTypeEnum.description:
* `feishu` - Feishu
* `wecom` - Wecom
* `wecom_bot` - Wecom Bot
* `qq_group` - Qq Group
* `qq_guild` - Qq Guild
* `email` - Email

notes.description: Research brief injected into the AI moderator prompt.

show_counter_chip.description: Render the 'Concept N of M' chip in the room.

InboxItem.description: Read-only list serializer for researcher inbox.

InboxItemKindEnum.description:
* `session_completed` - Session Completed
* `insight_ready` - Insight Ready
* `study_completed` - Study Completed
* `study_stuck` - Study Stuck

InterviewSessionList.description:
Lighter ``InterviewSession`` shape for list endpoints.

Transcripts + vision_frames + decision_log can be very large
(>1 MB per session for long interviews). The list endpoint omits
them — callers that need the full payload hit ``retrieve``.
Derived fields (``turn_count``, ``duration_seconds``) give the
list UI enough to render per-row chips without paying the cost.

ParticipationStatusEnum.description:
* `invited` - Invited
* `started` - Started
* `consented` - Consented
* `screened` - Screened
* `interviewing` - Interviewing
* `completed` - Completed
* `dropped` - Dropped
